title: Exercises: Quantum Job Management and Scheduling

exercises.title: Job State Machine Implementation
exercises.description: Implement a finite state machine for quantum job lifecycle management.
tasks: Define all valid job states as an enum
Implement valid state transitions (e.g., QUEUED can go to RUNNING but not CREATED)
Add transition validation that raises errors on invalid transitions
Implement state change callbacks/hooks
Add timestamp tracking for each state transition
exercises.expectedOutput: Working state machine with validation and callbacks
hints: CREATED can transition to QUEUED or CANCELLED
COMPLETED and FAILED are terminal states
Callbacks execute when entering a state

exercises.title: Batch Job Processor
exercises.description: Build a robust batch job processor with parallel submission and monitoring.
tasks: Implement parallel job submission with configurable concurrency
Add progress tracking with percentage completion
Implement partial result collection (return completed results even if some fail)
Add timeout handling for the entire batch
Implement job dependency chains (job B waits for job A)
exercises.expectedOutput: Batch processor with parallel execution and dependency support
hints: Dependencies form a DAG - use topological sort
Partial results: collect what completed before timeout

exercises.title: Intelligent Job Scheduler
exercises.description: Create a job scheduler that optimizes backend selection based on multiple factors.
tasks: Implement multi-factor scoring for backend selection
Factor in: queue length, hardware fidelity, cost, qubit topology
Add support for job affinity (prefer same backend for related jobs)
Implement load balancing across multiple backends
Add predictive scheduling based on historical queue times
hints: Normalize scores to 0-100 range for comparison
Weight factors based on job priorities
Affinity: bonus points for previously used backend
Moving average for queue time prediction

exercises.title: Session Manager for VQE
exercises.description: Implement a session manager optimized for variational quantum eigensolvers.
tasks: Implement session lifecycle with automatic renewal
Add circuit caching to avoid recompilation
Implement parameter batching for multiple VQE iterations
Add checkpointing to resume from failures
Track optimization progress and convergence
exercises.starterCode:
from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Callable
from dataclasses import dataclass
import pickle

@dataclass
class VQEIteration:
    parameters: List[float]
    energy: float
    iteration: int
    circuit_hash: str

class VQESessionManager:
    def __init__(self, backend: str, max_session_time: int = 3600):
        self.backend = backend
        self.max_time = max_session_time
        self.session_id: Optional[str] = None
        self._circuit_cache: Dict[str, Any] = {}
        self._iterations: List[VQEIteration] = []
        self._checkpoint_file: Optional[str] = None
    
    def start_session(self) -> str:
        """Start or resume VQE session."""
        pass
    
    def run_iteration(self, parameters: List[float],
                     ansatz_circuit: Any) -> float:
        """Run single VQE iteration, return energy."""
        pass
    
    def run_batch_parameters(self,
                            parameter_sets: List[List[float]],
                            ansatz_circuit: Any) -> List[float]:
        """Run multiple parameter sets efficiently."""
        pass
    
    def checkpoint(self, filepath: str) -> None:
        """Save current state to file."""
        pass
    
    def restore(self, filepath: str) -> bool:
        """Restore from checkpoint."""
        pass
    
    def get_convergence_history(self) -> List[float]:
        """Return energy values for all iterations."""
        pass
    
    def _should_renew_session(self) -> bool:
        """Check if session needs renewal."""
        pass
exercises.expectedOutput: VQE session manager with caching and checkpointing
hints: Hash circuits to check cache hits
Checkpoint includes parameters, energies, and iteration count
Renew session before it expires automatically
Batch parameters to reduce API calls
